billingConfig.title: Billing mode
billingConfig.modeDescription: Self-use records usage only. Subscription billing limits usage by plan credits. Usage billing calculates cost from model pricing.
billingConfig.prepaidAmountDescription: In usage billing, calls can start only when the account balance meets this amount. The final deduction still uses the actual bill.

payment.title: Payment settings
payment.usdToCnyRateDescription: Used to convert plan prices from the USD baseline to CNY payment amounts.
payment.channelsDescription: Stripe and EPay can be enabled together. Users choose the channel at checkout.
payment.enableStripeDescription: Allow users to pay through Stripe Checkout.
payment.stripeWebhookEndpointDescription: Add this webhook endpoint in Stripe Dashboard.
payment.stripeWebhookSecretDescription: Used to verify Stripe webhook signatures.
payment.enableEPayDescription: Allow users to choose payment types through EPay.
payment.epayGatewayDescription: EPay API gateway. Must start with http:// or https://.
payment.epayTypesDescription: Use name as the frontend display name and type as the channel value sent to EPay.

plans.title: Plans
plans.dialogDescription: Configure plan price, usage credit, and discount.
plans.name: Name

modelPricing.title: Model pricing
modelPricing.dialogDescription: Configure the platform model billing mode and base unit prices.
modelPricing.jsonHint: Valid JSON syncs to the form state immediately. Saving still uses the current model pricing API.

jsonErrors.root: Model pricing JSON must be an object.
jsonErrors.model: Platform model name cannot be changed from JSON.
jsonErrors.mode: pricingMode must be token, call, duration, or tiered.
jsonErrors.tiered: Tiered pricing requires a non-empty tieredPricing.tiers array.

modelPricing.tieredHint: Tier matching uses raw input token ranges.
modelPricing.tierNote: Limits are entered in K tokens. 0 means the last tier is unlimited.

toolPricing.title: Tool pricing
toolPricing.nativeToolBillingDescription: When enabled, OpenAI, Anthropic, and xAI native tools are billed using official default tool prices. Self-use mode still records usage only.
toolPricing.defaultPriceDescription: Default prices apply to native server-side tools. Model tokens produced by tool results are still billed through model pricing.
toolPricing.note: OpenAI Shell / image generation / code interpreter and Claude Advisor / code execution are not simple per-call charges, so they are recorded only until upstream usage can be mapped precisely.

toast.sessionExpiredDescription: Please sign in again to continue.
toast.unknownError: Request failed. Please try again later.
toast.paymentRateRequired: Enter a valid USD -> CNY rate.
toast.stripeRequired: Stripe requires Secret Key and Webhook Secret.
toast.epayRequired: EPay requires gateway URL, merchant ID, and merchant key.
toast.epayTypesInvalid: EPay payment types must be a JSON array containing name and type.
toast.prepaidInvalidDescription: Enter a USD amount greater than or equal to 0.
toast.nativeToolBillingSaveFailed: Failed to save native tool billing
toast.importInvalidJSON: Import failed: JSON does not match the model pricing schema
toast.importEmpty: Import failed: no model pricing entries to import

importErrors.invalidJSON: File content is not valid JSON
importErrors.rootObject: Model pricing JSON must be an object keyed by platform model name
importErrors.emptyModelName: Platform model name cannot be empty
importErrors.invalidPricingMode: {model}.pricingMode must be token, call, duration, or tiered
importErrors.invalidNumber: {model}.{field} must be a number greater than or equal to 0
importErrors.invalidTieredPricing: {model}.{field} must contain a non-empty tiers array
